name: agent-card-fleet-summary-action
description: GitHub Action that walks a directory of A2A AgentCards, counts by autonomy / memory, surfaces governance gaps (autonomous-without-IRU, destructive-tool-on-non-autonomous, persistent-memory-without-refusal-taxonomy, etc.), posts a Markdown summary as a PR comment, and fails the build when high-severity findings exist. Composes with agent-card-fleet-summary.
author: mizcausevic-dev
